title: ragal #7270
definition:
1) to go on foot, spy out, foot it, go about, walk along, move the feet
    1a) (Qal) to be a tale-bearer, slander, go about
    1b) (Piel)
        1b1) to slander
        1b2) to go about as explorer, spy
    1c) (Tiphel) to teach to walk
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal) to be a tale-bearer, slander, go about
    1b) (Piel)

    1c) (Tiphel) to teach to walk

    NASB:  to go about on foot
